results.title: Toy Story 5 shows ‘terror’ of children’s screen addiction, says Tom Hanks
results.description: US actor Tom Hanks has said the latest Toy Story film highlights children's addiction to screens, an issue that he says strikes "terror in the heart".

results.title: LEGO releases 4 new Botanical sets, and they’re cheaper than you think
results.description: LEGO unveils four creative Botanical sets, including fungi and aquatic plants, expanding its adult-oriented collection.
